name: all-de-apps-workspace
description: Meta-scripts for sibling apps. verify:all is strict (CI): install Svivva (npm i), Pyracrypt & Ai-Tools-Hub (pnpm i), cyberwavy-hub (npm i). Local-only escapes: SKIP_PNPM_WORKSPACES=1, SKIP_CYBERWAVY_VERIFY=1.

scripts.vercel-build: cd "Svivva" && npm run build:vercel && rm -rf ../.next ../public && cp -R .next ../.next && cp -R public ../public
scripts.verify:all: npm run verify:svivva && npm run verify:cyberwavy && npm run verify:pnpm-workspaces
